case_title: CHUEN POON NG VS. JUDY RUTH PAIGE ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF NG, CHUEN POON AS TO DEFENDANT PAIGE, JUDY RUTH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG, CHUEN POON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAIGE, JUDY RUTH DOES 1 TO 10, IN OCCUPANCY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 529 25TH AVENUE, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, CHUEN POON AS TO DEFENDANT PAIGE, JUDY RUTH DOES 1 TO 10, IN OCCUPANCY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
